document_type: HUF Root Finder — Comprehensive Distributional Observable Catalog
design_principle: HUF is the opposite of compaction. Look for more roots. Bigger is better. More data more roots. If small makes for uncertainty, then large is certain.
data_source: Backblaze Q1 2024 through Q4 2025, 130 days, all drives every day

root_1_uniformity_departure.what_it_measures: How far the carrier distribution is from uniform. TV distance, Gini coefficient, Hellinger distance, JS divergence, KL divergence, KS statistic, Theil index, Atkinson(0.5), Evenness, and Elbow ALL measure the same structural property from different mathematical angles.
root_1_uniformity_departure.key_insight: 11 metrics that textbooks treat as distinct observables are ONE root on real data. The entire distance-from-uniform and inequality literature collapses to a single empirical dimension for this distribution.
root_1_uniformity_departure.huf_mapping: CL-02 territory. This is what the TV-based drift detector monitors.

root_2_log_inequality.what_it_measures: Log-scale sensitivity to small carriers. Atkinson(1) = 1 - geometric_mean/arithmetic_mean. GE(0) = mean log deviation. Both weight tiny carriers more heavily than Root 1 metrics.
root_2_log_inequality.key_insight: This is a SEPARATE root from Root 1 because log-scale transforms amplify the tail differently from linear distances. The Backblaze fleet has many tiny carriers (1-10 drives) that Root 1 largely ignores but Root 2 captures.
root_2_log_inequality.huf_mapping: New — not captured by existing CL layers. Tail-carrier health monitor.

root_3_effective_complexity.representative: N1 / Keff_Shannon (or N2, HHI, CR4, any Rényi q=0.5-3)
root_3_effective_complexity.what_it_measures: How many carriers are 'effectively present' in the distribution. The ENTIRE mid-band Rényi spectrum (q=0.5 through q=3) plus HHI, CR4, and top-5 share are ONE root.
root_3_effective_complexity.key_insight: THIS IS THE KCN-001 RESOLUTION IN DATA. Shannon-Keff (N1) and Participation Ratio (N2) have r > 0.90. They are the same root. The 'two different formulas' were two views of ONE observable. Labeling was the only problem, not structural inconsistency.
root_3_effective_complexity.huf_mapping: CL-03 territory. Keff_Shannon is the canonical representative. N2, HHI, CR4 are redundant views of the same root.

root_4_variance_concentration.what_it_measures: Variance-weighted concentration. GE(2) = half the squared coefficient of variation. chi2 distance from uniform. Top-3 carrier share. These are all sensitive to the SPREAD of the probability vector, not just its effective size.
root_4_variance_concentration.key_insight: Separate from Root 3 (effective complexity) because two distributions can have the same Keff but different variance structures. Top-3 share vs top-5 share differ — the 3-carrier oligopoly structure is its own signal.
root_4_variance_concentration.huf_mapping: New — oligopoly-sensitivity metric. Captures the top-3 dominance structure that Keff averages over.

root_5_distribution_shape.what_it_measures: Shape of the probability distribution — how pointy or flat, how asymmetric. Independent from both concentration (Root 3) and departure from uniform (Root 1).
root_5_distribution_shape.key_insight: Two distributions can have identical Keff AND identical TV distance from uniform but different shapes. Heavy-tailed vs light-tailed carrier distributions behave differently under perturbation.
root_5_distribution_shape.huf_mapping: New — perturbation sensitivity diagnostic. High kurtosis means a few extreme carriers dominate the distribution's character.
root_5_distribution_shape.temporal_cv: 13.96% — most volatile structural root (shape changes faster than level)

root_6_carrier_richness.what_it_measures: How many distinct carrier types exist. Pure counting — ignores proportions entirely. Also tracks n_singleton (tail carriers) and n_eff_gap (richness minus effective complexity).
root_6_carrier_richness.key_insight: Richness is independent from effective complexity. A fleet can have 81 carriers (high richness) but Keff=18 (low effective complexity) because most carriers have tiny shares. The gap n - Keff is itself diagnostic.
root_6_carrier_richness.huf_mapping: CL-01 territory. Carrier demodulation. Also connects to a3 (carrier completeness) in the DAQ.

root_7_dominant_carrier.what_it_measures: The single largest carrier's share. N5, Ninf, R5, Rinf, and max_p all track the dominant carrier. total_drives clusters here because fleet size changes correlate with dominant-carrier procurement.
root_7_dominant_carrier.key_insight: The extreme Rényi tail (q=5 to q=∞) is a SEPARATE root from the mid-band (q=0.5-3). This confirms KCN-001: the Rényi family genuinely has multiple independent roots. q=0, q=0.5-3, and q=5-∞ are three distinct structural dimensions.
root_7_dominant_carrier.huf_mapping: This IS a2 (concentration resistance) in the DAQ. The dominant-carrier root is the one that produces correct cross-domain rankings.

root_8_failure_rate.what_it_measures: Proportion of drives that failed on a given day.
root_8_failure_rate.key_insight: Completely independent from ALL structural metrics (confirming r = -0.06 Keff-failure decorrelation). Structure does not predict failure. Failure is its own observable.
root_8_failure_rate.huf_mapping: CL-04 territory. Operational outcome. The verdict layer consumes this independently of CL-03 structural metrics.

root_9_failure_count.what_it_measures: Absolute number of failures per day (distinct from rate because fleet size varies).
root_9_failure_count.key_insight: Count and rate are separate roots because fleet growth means more drives but not proportionally more failures. The absolute-count signal has different temporal character from the rate signal.
root_9_failure_count.huf_mapping: CL-04 secondary observable. Count vs rate may trigger different CL-04 verdicts.

implication_1_renyi_resolution.title: The Rényi spectrum gives exactly THREE independent roots, not one and not eight
implication_1_renyi_resolution.description: q=0 (richness), q=0.5-3 (effective complexity band), q=5-∞ (dominant carrier). The mid-band is ONE root despite spanning 6 Rényi orders. But the extremes are genuinely independent. KCN-001 is CONFIRMED: Shannon-Keff and Participation Ratio are the same root (r>0.90). The 'two different formulas' were redundant views of one observable.
implication_1_renyi_resolution.action: Keep all three Rényi zones in the observation layer. The mid-band needs only one representative (Keff_Shannon canonical). The extremes (N0 and Ninf) are separately informative.

implication_2_daq_expansion.title: The DAQ (4 metrics) captures 4 of 9 roots — 5 roots were unmeasured
implication_2_daq_expansion.description: DAQ a0 maps to Root 1 (uniformity departure). DAQ a1 is a cross-domain variant of Root 1. DAQ a2 maps to Root 7 (dominant carrier). DAQ a3 maps to Root 6 (richness). Missing: Root 2 (log-inequality), Root 3 (effective complexity), Root 4 (variance-concentration), Root 5 (distribution shape), Roots 8-9 (failure). The DAQ should expand.
implication_2_daq_expansion.action: Expand the accuracy metric set from 4 to at minimum 6 structural roots plus 2 operational roots.

implication_3_eigenvalue_hierarchy.title: 4 dimensions capture 95% of variance — 6 capture 99%
implication_3_eigenvalue_hierarchy.description: The distributional truth of the Backblaze fleet lives in a 4-6 dimensional space, despite 44 metrics being computable. This is the 'quartic for a reason' vindication: 4 dimensions are the natural structural depth. But 6 dimensions are needed for completeness.
implication_3_eigenvalue_hierarchy.action: The structural amplifier should operate on 6 roots (the '99% system'). The observation layer stores all 44 metrics but the control path needs only 6.

implication_4_failure_decorrelation.title: Failure is completely decorrelated from ALL structure — not just Keff
implication_4_failure_decorrelation.description: failure_rate is independent of ALL 42 structural metrics, not just Keff. No distributional property of the carrier mix predicts when drives fail. Structure monitors structural health, not operational outcome.
implication_4_failure_decorrelation.action: CL-04 verdict must consume failure data independently. No structural metric can substitute for direct failure measurement.

implication_5_shape_is_new.title: Distribution shape (kurtosis/skewness) is a genuinely new root
implication_5_shape_is_new.description: Shape has 13.96% temporal CV — the most volatile structural metric. Shape changes faster than level. This suggests shape is an early warning: the distribution changes shape before it changes effective complexity.
implication_5_shape_is_new.action: Add shape monitoring (kurtosis or skewness) to the CL-03 observation layer. Potential early-warning diagnostic.

structural_roots: Root 1: Uniformity departure (TV, Gini, Evenness, Hellinger, JS, KL, KS, Theil, Atkinson_05, Elbow)
Root 3: Effective complexity (Keff_Shannon, N2, HHI, CR4, top5, all Rényi q=0.5-3)
Root 6: Carrier richness (N0, n_carriers, n_singleton, n_eff_gap)
Root 7: Dominant carrier (Ninf, max_p, N5, R5, Rinf)
the_nine_root_system.daq_coverage: 4 of 9 roots (a0→Root 1, a1→Root 1 variant, a2→Root 7, a3→Root 6). Roots 2-5 and 8-9 were uncovered.
